mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supermarket_info ( cover_image, logo_image, name, phone, description, business_hours, address, longitude, latitude, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{data.coverImage}, #{data.logoImageUrl}, #{data.name}, COALESCE(#{data.phone}, ''), COALESCE(#{data.description}, ''), COALESCE(#{data.businessHours}, ''), #{data.address}, #{data.longitude}, #{data.latitude}, #{data.status}, now(), now() )
mapper.update:
update supermarket_info set delete_time = now() where id in
#{item}

update supermarket_info
cover_image = #{data.coverImage},
logo_image = #{data.logoImageUrl},
name = #{data.name},
phone = #{data.phone},
description = #{data.description},
business_hours = #{data.businessHours},
address = #{data.address},
longitude = #{data.longitude},
latitude = #{data.latitude},
status = #{data.status},
update_time = now(),
where id = #{data.id} and delete_time is null
mapper.select:
SELECT bcs.circle_id AS circleId, bcs.shop_id AS shopId, bc.name AS circleName FROM business_circle_shop bcs left join supermarket_info bc on bcs.circle_id = bc.id WHERE bcs.shop_id IN
#{item}
SELECT * FROM `supermarket_info` WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL

select id, name, status from supermarket_info
and name like concat('%', #{param.keyword}, '%')
and status = #{param.searchIntStatus}
and delete_time is null
order by id desc
